scripts.format:sql: UV_CACHE_DIR=.cache/uv UV_TOOL_DIR=.cache/uv-tools uvx sqlfluff==4.1.0 format --dialect postgres --processes 1 --disable-progress-bar .
scripts.lint:sql: UV_CACHE_DIR=.cache/uv UV_TOOL_DIR=.cache/uv-tools uvx sqlfluff==4.1.0 lint --dialect postgres --processes 1 --disable-progress-bar .
scripts.validate: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run openspec:validate
